description.value: Aura moderate varies; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 32,800 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This ominous staff is made of twisting wood and topped with a small skull. It allows use of the following spells: Deathwatch (1 charge) Detect undead (1 charge) Gentle repose (1 charge) Death ward (2 charges) Speak with dead (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells death ward, deathwatch, detect undead, gentle repose, speak with dead; Cost 16,400 gp.
